user.title: SmarterThings
user.description: Choose a Home Assistant entity that belongs to the Samsung SmartThings range used for clock sync. Additional Samsung appliance diagnostics are discovered automatically.

error.not_smartthings: Choose an entity provided by the SmartThings integration.
error.no_device: The selected entity is not linked to a Home Assistant device.
error.no_smartthings_identifier: The selected device does not have a SmartThings device identifier.

no_configured_range.message: No SmarterThings range clock target is configured.
